title: serissa crassiramea
intro: Serissa crassiramea, also known as the forest serissa or small-leaf tree serissa, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as lowering blood pressure, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory issues, among others. In herbal preparations, Serissa crassiramea is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional folk medicine in various parts of Asia.
